login.title: Sign in to {{appName}}
login.subtitle: Sign in to browse and play media. Administrators can manage libraries, uploads, and the console.

avatar.label: Avatar
avatar.title: Avatar
avatar.hint_part1: Use the slider below to scale the photo and drag inside the circle to adjust the crop. Or you can

password.label: Password
password.title: Password
password.hint: Set a new login password (at least 6 characters). After saving, please log in with the new password.
password.too_short: Password must be at least 6 characters

language.label: Language
language.title: Language
language.field_label: Interface Language (syncs preferred audio track / subtitle language)

audio.label: Audio & Subtitle
audio.title: Audio & Subtitle
audio.hint: These settings control how audio tracks and subtitles are selected in the player.
audio.sdh_search: SDH (Subtitles for Deaf/Hard of Hearing) search

subtitle_appearance.label: Subtitle appearance
subtitle_appearance.title: Subtitle appearance
subtitle_appearance.preview_text: These settings affect subtitles on this device
subtitle_appearance.hint: These settings do not apply to graphic subtitles (PGS, DVD, etc.) or subtitles with their own embedded styling (ASS/SSA).
subtitle_appearance.pos_bottom_hint: Sets the subtitle vertical position relative to the bottom of the screen.
subtitle_appearance.pos_top_hint: Sets the highest vertical position relative to the top of the screen. Used when subtitles include directives to place them at the top.

settings.footnote_admin: Administrators can use the sidebar (Libraries, Upload, Console) for management and operations.
settings.footnote_user: You can browse media, favorite items, and play. Libraries and uploads are maintained by administrators.
settings.footnote_warning: In production environments please change the JWT secret in server config.yml and do not share the administrator account.

messages.asr_install_request_failed: ASR install request failed (may have timed out; check server logs)
messages.ocr_install_request_failed: OCR install request failed (may have timed out; check server logs)
messages.classify_install_request_failed: Photo classification install failed (may have timed out; check server logs)
messages.face_install_request_failed: Face detection install failed (may have timed out; check server logs)
messages.cache_path_manual_hint: Enter a directory path accessible to the server

general.preferred_display_language_desc_prefix: Interface and copy refinement is an ongoing effort.
general.start_on_boot_desc: Starts the tray icon when Windows boots (desktop install). If Knox runs as a Windows service, disable this and start the service on boot instead.
general.open_browser_first_start: Open browser on first server start
general.open_browser_first_start_desc: Opens the default browser to the web UI only on the first start; not repeated after process restarts.
general.maintenance_mode_desc: Users will only see the maintenance message.
general.cache_path_desc: Custom location for server cache files (e.g. images). Leave blank for the server default.

playback.device_scope_note: These settings affect playback for all users on this server.
playback.home_stream_quality_desc: Default maximum bitrate for remote or local playback (depends on server transcoding).
playback.screen_orientation_desc: Display orientation policy for fullscreen playback on clients.

transcoder.quality_desc: Quality profile used by the transcoder.
transcoder.temp_dir_desc: Directory used for temporary transcode files.
transcoder.download_temp_dir_desc: Directory for transcoded downloads before client download.
transcoder.throttle_buffer_desc: Seconds to buffer before throttling the transcoder.
transcoder.bg_x264_preset_desc: x264 preset for background transcodes (sync and media optimizer). Lower values improve quality and reduce size but take longer.
transcoder.hardware_acceleration_desc: GPU hardware acceleration for transcoding. Select None to use CPU software encoding (libx264).
transcoder.enable_hardware_encoding_desc: When enabled, the transcoder uses the selected hardware acceleration for H.264 video encoding.
transcoder.disable_video_transcode_desc: Disables transcoding of video streams. Audio transcoding and remuxing may still occur.
transcoder.max_cpu_concurrent_desc: Limits concurrent instant transcodes during live playback so viewers stay smooth (mainly CPU software encodes; may fall back to CPU when GPU is saturated).
transcoder.max_bg_concurrent_desc: Limits concurrent background jobs such as video optimization and download prep, so they do not compete with live playback.

asr.intro: ASR settings are stored in config.yml under subtitle.asr. Use one-click install to deploy to tools/recognition/ (Python venv) if dependencies are missing.
asr.auto_on_scan_desc: When importing or scanning libraries, queue new videos for subtitle_task (extract embedded/sidecar subtitles; run ASR when none exist).
asr.ai_proofread_desc: When at least one AI LLM provider is enabled (System Options → AI Providers), successfully recognized subtitles/lyrics are sent to the LLM to fix typos, homophones, missing characters and OCR noise. Only obvious errors are corrected; language and meaning are preserved.
asr.provider_desc: Optional automatic speech recognition when no subtitles exist. Whisper CLI runs the whisper command; Shell uses a custom script with {input}, {output_dir}, {output_vtt} placeholders.
asr.whisper_path_desc: Used when provider is whisper_cli; defaults to whisper if blank.
asr.extra_args_desc: Whisper CLI args, space-separated (e.g. --model small --language zh).
asr.shell_cmd_desc: Used when provider is shell; may reference tools/asr/asr_to_vtt.py.

ocr.intro: OCR settings are in config.yml under subtitle.graphical_ocr. One-click install deploys Python packages and tools/tesseract/ (Windows).
ocr.enable_desc: Tesseract OCR for bitmap subtitles such as PGS and VobSub.
ocr.python_path_desc: Interpreter for OCR scripts; blank uses python on Windows, python3 elsewhere.
ocr.script_path_desc: Absolute or relative path to bitmap_subtitle_ocr.py.

photo_classify.intro: Photo AI classification is in config.yml photo_classify. Heuristic engine is built into Go; ONNX needs Python and MobileNet. One-click install deploys to tools/photo_classify/ (shared tools/recognition/.venv).
photo_classify.auto_on_scan_desc: Queues new photos for photo_classify_task when importing or scanning libraries.
photo_classify.engine_desc: auto: ONNX when model present; heuristic: built-in only; onnx: force ONNX.
photo_classify.engine_auto: Auto (ONNX when model present, else heuristic)
photo_classify.python_path_desc: Interpreter for classify.py; blank uses python on Windows, python3 elsewhere.
photo_classify.script_path_desc: Relative or absolute path to classify.py.
photo_classify.model_path_desc: MobileNetV2 ONNX model; required for auto/onnx.
photo_classify.labels_path_desc: One class name per line, matching model output indices.

photo_face.intro: Face detection and clustering is in config.yml photo_face (InsightFace, shared tools/recognition/.venv).
photo_face.auto_on_scan_desc: Queues new photos for photo_face_task when importing or scanning libraries.
photo_face.similarity_threshold_desc: Cosine similarity to treat faces as same person; 0.3–0.6, default 0.45.
photo_face.python_path_desc: Interpreter for detect.py; blank uses photo classification Python path.
photo_face.script_path_desc: Relative or absolute path to detect.py.

doc_trans.intro: Office document preview tries engines in order: Microsoft Office, WPS, LibreOffice. LibreOffice defaults to tools/doctran.
doc_trans.engine_priority_desc: Try top to bottom; only installed available engines are used.
doc_trans.enable_desc: When off, Office formats are download-only.
doc_trans.cache_ttl_desc: Converted cache older than this is ignored and reconverted.
doc_trans.timeout_desc: Max wait for a single LibreOffice conversion.

search.title: Search
search.start_hint: Enter a keyword to start searching

task_manager.confirm_cleanup_7d: Clean up failed tasks older than 7 days?
task_manager.confirm_subtitle_cleanup_failed: Delete all failed subtitle task records? (subtitle files are kept; only the task table is cleared)
task_manager.confirm_subtitle_cleanup_old: Delete completed/failed task records older than 30 days?
task_manager.subtitle_help: One record per video. Records show status and finish time when handled manually in the media detail, when a library scan discovers new videos (with subtitle.auto_on_scan), or when the scheduled task "subtitle_process" runs in bulk.
task_manager.confirm_subtitle_reset: This clears the subtitle cache and DB records and marks the media as pending. Continue?
task_manager.confirm_subtitle_delete: Remove this subtitle task from the list? (Generated subtitle files are kept.)
task_manager.lyric_help: One record per audio track. After queuing "Recognize lyrics" from the track list, the backend uses ASR to produce WebVTT and converts it to an LRC file in the same folder.
task_manager.confirm_lyric_cleanup_failed: Delete all failed lyric recognition tasks?
task_manager.task_type_transcode_cleanup: Clean up historical failed transcode tasks
task_manager.form_library_all_placeholder: Leave blank or 0 for all libraries

upload.target_placeholder: Pick a library and folder; leave blank to save to the default upload directory
upload.pick_parent_first: Please select a parent folder first

api_credentials.title: API credentials
api_credentials.info_title: Third-party apps obtain access tokens via OAuth2 Client Credentials
api_credentials.info_desc_middle: with grant_type=client_credentials, client_id, client_secret (application/x-www-form-urlencoded or JSON supported).
api_credentials.revoke_confirm_content: After revoking, its client_secret can no longer exchange for tokens.
api_credentials.secret_warning_default: client_secret is shown only once; you cannot view it again after closing

users.library_required: Pick at least one library, or enable "Allow access to all libraries"
users.schedule_conflict: Parental access schedules conflict. Please adjust and save again.
users.schedule_time_conflict: Schedule time conflict. Please check weekday and time settings.
users.set_password_in_basic_info: For new users, fill the initial password under Basic Info
users.password_too_short: Password must be at least 6 characters
users.alert_basic: Basic info defines the user's identity and initial login.
users.field_allow_manage: Allow user to manage this server
users.alert_access: Access control decides which libraries the user can see and what they can do.
users.folders_hint: Choose the media folders to share with this user. Administrators can edit all folders under Libraries.
users.features_disabled_hint: When disabled, the user cannot access features requiring authorization or new device authorization flows.
users.alert_parental: Parental controls can restrict playback by rating, time and PIN.
users.schedule_hint: Add multiple schedules. Access is only allowed within the covered weekdays and time slots (schedules remain in the form when parental controls are disabled).
users.tag_create_password_hint: For new users, fill the initial password under Basic Info.

library.field_encrypted_assets_hint: After scan or upload, store Knox 9527 envelope-encrypted files (.enc)

scrape_config.provider_desc_tmdb: The Movie Database (TMDb) is a community-maintained movie and TV database providing rich metadata: posters, backdrops, cast, ratings, and more. Multi-language support; the default metadata source for Kodi, Plex, Jellyfin, etc.
scrape_config.provider_desc_omdb: The Open Movie Database (OMDb) is a RESTful web service for movie and TV metadata. Backed by IMDb data, it provides titles, years, ratings, cast, synopses, and so on. Requires an API key.
scrape_config.provider_desc_bangumi: Bangumi is a Chinese database and community focused on ACGN (anime, comics, games, novels), offering detailed anime episode info, characters, staff, etc. Particularly well suited for Japanese anime scraping.
scrape_config.provider_desc_tvdb: TheTVDB.com is an open TV database providing complete episode guides, season info, cast, posters, banners, and more. An authoritative source for TV management; multi-language. API key required (subscription).
scrape_config.provider_desc_douban: Douban is a Chinese community site providing information and user reviews on films, TV, books, and music. Its movie database is rich in Chinese metadata, ratings, and reviews — ideal for Chinese-language content scraping.
scrape_config.provider_desc_fanart: Fanart.tv is a high-quality fanart database focused on movie and TV fan art: HD posters, backdrops, logos, thumbnails, and so on. Works well alongside other metadata providers.
scrape_config.provider_desc_ai: AI recognition uses large language models and computer vision to infer metadata from file names and on-screen content. No external API required; supports fuzzy name matching and smart classification of unknown media — useful when traditional providers fail.

proofread.select_line: Select a line on the left to edit
proofread.no_cues: This subtitle has no editable lines

library_provider_source_tabs.metadata_required: Please pick at least one metadata source
library_provider_source_tabs.image_required: Please pick at least one image source
library_provider_source_tabs.metadata_hint: Check the metadata sources you want; drag the handles to adjust priority. Lower-priority sources only fill in missing information.
library_provider_source_tabs.image_hint: Check the image sources you want; drag the handles to adjust priority. Lower-priority sources only fill in missing posters or backdrops.

photo_smart_classify.empty_hint_default: No classification results. Run AI classification first.
photo_smart_classify.no_people_hint: No face clusters. Have an administrator run Face detection or rescan the photo library. Initial run requires InsightFace.
photo_smart_classify.no_places_hint: No location data. Make sure photos have EXIF GPS and have an administrator run Resolve GPS locations or rescan the library.

player_engine.title: Desktop playback engine
player_engine.desc: In Auto mode, browser-friendly formats (MP4/H.264/AAC) use Web playback to avoid mpv overlay blocking UI; MKV/HEVC/DTS use mpv automatically.
player_engine.label: Playback engine
player_engine.fallback_mpv: Web playback failed; falling back to mpv
